import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 10 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn find_index(_ seen: String, _ token: String) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(seen)
  mut i = 0
  mut idx = 0
  mut current = ""
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(seen, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 10
      if current == token
        return Some(idx)
      end
      idx = idx + 1
      current = ""
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  None
end

fn token_at(_ seen: String, _ idx: Int) -> String
  let n = string.len(seen)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur_idx = 0
  mut current = ""
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(seen, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 10
      if cur_idx == idx
        return current
      end
      cur_idx = cur_idx + 1
      current = ""
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  current
end

fn increment_at(_ counts: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = counts.len()
  while i < n
    let v = match counts.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if i == idx
      result = list.push(result, v + 1)
    else
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn record(_ seen: String, _ counts: List<Int>, _ token: String) -> Unit
  ()
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut seen = ""
mut counts: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if is_ws(b)
    if string.len(current) > 0
      match find_index(seen, current)
      when Some(idx)
        counts = increment_at(counts, idx)
      when None
        seen = "#{seen}#{current}\n"
        counts = list.push(counts, 1)
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if string.len(current) > 0
  match find_index(seen, current)
  when Some(idx)
    counts = increment_at(counts, idx)
  when None
    seen = "#{seen}#{current}\n"
    counts = list.push(counts, 1)
  end
end

let total = counts.len()
mut best_idx = 0
mut best_count = 0
mut j = 0
while j < total
  let v = match counts.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if v > best_count
    best_count = v
    best_idx = j
  end
  j = j + 1
end

if total > 0
  let tok = token_at(seen, best_idx)
  println("top=#{tok}=#{best_count}")
end
